nodes.label: AI as ideation partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as unnecessary in areas of expertise
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to gut check things I am learning or don't know myself

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely collaborate, I hear a lot about delegating tasks to AI but I don't really know how to do that

nodes.label: Personal voice and authentic relationship maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: It's important to me that I maintain my voice in all my work

nodes.label: AI as enhancement tool not replacement
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to human roles
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think what I do will be replaced by AI, just augmented by it

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: the latest release of Chat GPT 5 has me ready to cancel my subscription. The model seems actively worse for remembering things

nodes.label: Authentic personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy writing and want to sound like me

nodes.label: Creative fulfillment and discovery
nodes.grounding_span: the video reached over 300K people and is still growing in reach

nodes.label: Authentic human connection and trust
nodes.grounding_span: the personal touch and relationships are PARAMOUNT. AI can never replicate who I am or the way I make people feel heard

nodes.label: Skill development and learning
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to gut check things I am learning

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for viral content
nodes.grounding_span: it made me feel super satisfied when it helped me create my first video that went viral

nodes.label: Concern about improper AI use by others
nodes.grounding_span: I can absolutely tell when other creators incorporate AI into their copy and to be honest I have mixed feelings about it

nodes.label: Frustration with AI performance degradation
nodes.grounding_span: the latest release of Chat GPT 5 has me ready to cancel my subscription

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI use in design
nodes.grounding_span: I'd love to as the technology continues to improve

nodes.label: Domain-specific tool reliance — prefers specialized software over general AI
nodes.grounding_span: I consider myself an expert in the type of sales I do, whereas content creation is a new avenue for me

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I end up collaborating anyway. I haven't found a way to successfully delegate my work load to AI
